creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
I'm closing this PR, because Rails 4.1 was just created to allow the creation of the new port www/gitlab. GitLab itself switches in december 2015 to Rails 4.2, so this PR is no longer needed!

Also there is already a Beta for Rails 5. When Rails 5 will be released verson 4.1 will be unsupported through policy of Rails. Therefore there is no need to keep this old version!
